cards.title: Loomings Campaign Public Demo
highlights: Try out the first few missions of the campaign early!

en.title: Campaign Demo
highlights: Try out the first few missions of the campaign early!

en.title: SC: Evo 1.18.1
en.excerpt: Patch 1.18.1 brings numerous iterations to the ambitious changes in Patch 1.18, as well as significant reworks for the distribution of strength across the Terran and Zerg tech trees.

en.title: February Development Update
en.excerpt: Hey guys, its been a while since i've had time to sit down and write a full update on what's been going on but we've got quite the update in our hands now that we're able to upload to the Arcade once more!

es.title: Actualización de Desarrollo de Febrero
es.excerpt: ¡Hola chicos, ha pasado un tiempo desde que tuve tiempo de sentarme y escribir una actualización completa sobre lo que ha estado pasando, pero ahora tenemos una actualización bastante grande en nuestras manos que podemos subir al Arcade una vez más!

zh.title: 2月进度更新
zh.excerpt: 嘿，各位，我已经有一段时间没有时间坐下来写一篇完整的更新文章，汇报一下最近发生的事情了，但是现在游戏大厅上传开放了，所以我们手头上有很多更新内容！

ko.title: 2월 개발 소식February Development Update
ko.excerpt: Hey guys, its been a while since i've had time to sit down and write a full update on what's been going on but we've got quite the update in our hands now that we're able to upload to the Arcade once more!

ru.title: Февральское обновление о разработке
ru.excerpt: Эй, ребята, прошло много времени с тех пор, как у меня было время сесть и написать полный список о том, что происходит в разработке, но теперь, когда мы снова можем публиковать эти обновления в Игротеку, у нас в руках целый набор этих обновлений!

announcement.message: Update 0.4 deployed successfully, new mission avaialble for Patreon supporters.

en.message: Update 0.4 deployed successfully, new mission avaialble for Patreon supporters.
